review_snippets.text: 10\10 on the entire process.  Buddyjohn, the owner, showed up for the estimate and was on location while the work was done the entire time. review_snippets.name: Sandi C.
review_snippets.text:
They got to work as soon as they arrived, they worked seamlessly as a team and were through within the time frame we were given.
They took excellent of our property and did an amazing job! We would recommend them to anyone who needs paving done.

review_snippets.name: Shannon E.
review_snippets.text: Derby City Paving was fantastic from start to finish! They were professional, easy to communicate with, and showed up exactly when they said they would—with a large, hardworking crew. Every question we had was answered thoroughly, and they truly went the extra mile to make sure e

review_snippets.name: James C.
review_snippets.text: This local, family owned business is fantastic. We got a fair quote and they got right to work and did a great job. It is very high quality work and we were so impressed by all the little touches that they took care to do right. We would highly recommend this group.

review_snippets.text: Derby CD paving came to my property and told me they had some blacktop left over from another job ha ha I needed a small repair about 100 foot done.
